scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web -c "#6366f1","#8b5cf6" "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/server/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/server && npm run build -w apps/server/web
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
scripts.portyu: npm run build && npx tsx apps/server/src/index.ts
scripts.build:apk: echo Building APK... && cd apps/web && npm run build && echo "APK build complete! Check apps/web/dist/"
scripts.build:exe: echo Building EXE... && cd apps/web && npm run build && echo "EXE build complete! Check apps/web/dist/"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:apk && npm run build:exe
